auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Vitally REST API key used as the Basic Auth username. Create and copy keys in Vitally under Settings > Operations > Integrations > Vitally REST API: https://docs.vitally.io/en/articles/9880649-rest-api-overview.

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: Vitally REST API region. Use us for https://<subdomain>.rest.vitally.io or eu for https://rest.vitally-eu.io.

extraFields.label: Subdomain
extraFields.description: US REST API subdomain used to build https://<subdomain>.rest.vitally.io. Required for US accounts and ignored for EU accounts.

actions.name: create_account
actions.description: Create a Vitally account with an external ID, name, optional organization, and traits.

externalId.description: The unique account ID from your system.

organizationId.description: The Vitally-assigned organization ID to relate this account to.

traits.description: Vitally account traits keyed by trait name. Values are forwarded using Vitally's documented trait inference rules.

account.description: A raw Vitally account object returned by the REST API.

actions.name: delete_account
actions.description: Delete a Vitally account by its Vitally ID or external ID.

id.description: The Vitally account ID or the external ID supplied when creating it.

deleted.description: Whether Vitally accepted the delete request.

raw.description: The raw Vitally delete response payload.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Get a Vitally account by its Vitally ID or external ID.

id.description: The Vitally account ID or the external ID supplied when creating it.

account.description: A raw Vitally account object returned by the REST API.

actions.name: list_accounts
actions.description: List Vitally accounts with optional status and cursor pagination filters.

limit.description: The maximum number of accounts to return, up to 100.

from.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous Vitally list response.

items.description: A raw Vitally account object returned by the REST API.

accounts.description: Vitally accounts in the current page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page, or null when there are no more pages.

actions.name: update_account
actions.description: Update a Vitally account name, organization relationship, or traits by Vitally ID or external ID.

id.description: The Vitally account ID or the external ID supplied when creating it.

anyOf.description: The Vitally organization ID or external ID, or null to remove the organization relationship.

traits.description: Vitally account traits keyed by trait name. Values are forwarded using Vitally's documented trait inference rules.

account.description: A raw Vitally account object returned by the REST API.
